# proveItsMe.io

> A directory of personal chronicles. Each feed is one person's documented attempt to do something hard — build something, train for something, figure something out. No theory. Just the record of the work.

## About

proveItsMe.io is a personal chronicles platform where individuals publish daily training, work, and learning logs. Content is written by real people documenting real effort over time.

## User Feeds

Each user has their own chronicle at https://blog.proveitsme.io/[username]

Individual entries are at https://blog.proveitsme.io/[username]/[YYYY-MM-DD]

## Discovery

- [Sitemap](https://blog.proveitsme.io/sitemap.xml): All public profile and entry URLs
- [Global RSS](https://blog.proveitsme.io/rss.xml): Site-wide feed

## Content Notes

- All content is published voluntarily by users
- Entries are dated daily logs in HTML format
- Content reflects personal effort logs, not advice or authoritative information
